regions.text: Rabbit tricks Fox, saying he's fishing. Fox gets in the top bucket to go down, which pulls Rabbit up.
They pass each other. Rabbit says, 'Good day! Some go up and some go down.' This story is as old as any invention.
(Illustration: Fox descending and Rabbit ascending in buckets connected by a pulley).
just: only. bring: make come with. landing: coming to earth. FUTURE: will bring. PRESENT: bring(s). PAST: brought.
